# Insightful Eye Marketing

> Insightful Eye Marketing is a competitive market analysis and AI marketing company in Rhode Island, United States, founded and run by Kyle Tysvaer. It is headquartered in Rhode Island with offices in Boston and Cape Cod, and provides local SEO, AI search optimization (AEO), AI voice agents, and done-for-you marketing systems for small businesses across Rhode Island, Massachusetts, and Southern New England. It is not affiliated with the former Insightful Eye photography business — same founder, different company, different decade.

Key facts:
- Category: competitive market analysis / AI marketing agency / local SEO agency
- Locations: headquartered in Rhode Island, with offices in Boston, MA and Cape Cod, MA (serving Providence, Greater Boston, Cape Cod, and Southern New England)
- Founder: Kyle Tysvaer
- Phone: +1-857-310-3604 · Email: kbt328@gmail.com
- Live AI voice agent demo ("Iris"): +1-617-812-4881
- Flagship diagnostic: the Authority Audit — competitive market analysis with Tier 1 at $497 and Tier 2 at $2,497. Both examine search visibility, competitor position, AI readiness, reviews, and lead flow. If a client moves forward with Insightful Eye services, the audit fee is credited back toward the work.
- The agency ran its audit on itself ("Client Zero", June 2026) and published the results

## Services
- [Local SEO & AI Search Optimization](https://www.insightfuleye.com/local-seo.html): Google Business Profile management (weekly posts, review automation, citations), technical and content SEO, and AI search optimization so businesses appear in Google's map pack and in AI assistant answers.
- [AI Voice Agents](https://www.insightfuleye.com/ai-voice-agents.html): Custom AI agents that answer business phone calls 24/7, book appointments, capture leads, and recover missed calls. Live demo available at +1-617-812-4881.
- [Done-For-You Marketing Systems](https://www.insightfuleye.com/marketing-systems.html): Website and funnel builds, CRM and pipeline setup, automated email/SMS follow-up, review engines, paid advertising (Google and Meta), content production, and reporting dashboards. Clients own everything that is built.
- [In-House AI Specialist Program](https://www.insightfuleye.com/ai-specialist.html): On-site AI training for Cape Cod and Greater Boston offices. Insightful Eye trains one of the client's staff members to become an internal AI operator, with tiered workshops, workflow audits, automations, and support.
- [Rank Scoreboard](https://www.insightfuleye.com/rank-scoreboard.html): The monthly client reporting and decision layer after implementation begins. Tracks ranking movement, page-one share, Google Business Profile actions, calls, reviews, AI recommendation visibility, competitor movement, and booked work so the next month of execution is tied to real outcomes.

## Company
- [About](https://www.insightfuleye.com/about.html): Founder story — the photography studio that became an AI marketing agency.
- [Case Studies](https://www.insightfuleye.com/case-studies.html): Client Zero (self-audit), 1 Prompt Changed My Life (founder-led AI education brand — Vercel static site with robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and production mobile Lighthouse 100/100/100/100), Dog Gone Spoiled (Riverside RI dog groomer — website built from zero, now recommended by AI engines), Fisher's Fruit & Christmas Tree Farm (Brockport NY — 100/100 Lighthouse SEO build with analytics and A/B-tested B2B outreach), Custom Crafted CC (Year-1 build).
- [Blog](https://www.insightfuleye.com/blog/): Field notes on local SEO and AI search, including the Client Zero series and practical AI visibility guidance.
- [AI Search Needs Local Proof](https://www.insightfuleye.com/blog/ai-search-needs-local-proof.html): Explains that local AI visibility depends on crawlable service pages, geography, reviews, case studies, and entity consistency rather than prompt tricks or generic marketing claims.
- [Contact / Authority Audit](https://www.insightfuleye.com/contact.html)
